price: Und Wir erretteten bereits die Kinder lsra’ils von der schmachvollen Qual,
arabic: وَلَقَدۡ نَجَّيۡنَا بَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلۡعَذَابِ ٱلۡمُهِينِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: walaqad najjaynā banī is'rāīla mina al-ʿadhābi al-muhīni
